ops.body:
Lane C (workspace cc-steer-wc, on main 81b123bb) — paired DeLong is now the production default for comparative checkpoint verdicts. Landed:

- cc_steer/instrument.py: INSTRUMENT_CARD constant (~/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.json) + InstrumentCard.load (keys mde/stopping/mde_paired); Comparison dataclass; paired_verdict (MDE = 2.8016*SE_delta_paired, measured rho) and unpaired_verdict (card frame-MDE fallback when a counterpart probs vector is absent); sub-threshold deltas render as "within noise floor (MDE <value>)", never win/loss. rho now NaN (not ZeroDivisionError) when a degenerate arm has zero DeLong variance.
- cc_steer/retrain/watcher.py: every incumbent-relative gate computes paired_delong over both fire vectors and persists BOTH arms' per-row P(NO_STEER) + the full DeLong record + card verdict to <run>/paired_comparison.json BEFORE judging (survives reject and judging failure); DeLong stats (auc_delta, se, rho, ci95, mde_paired, actionable) ride GateVerdict.stats into the journal and registry metadata.
- cc_steer/retrain/promotion.py: watcher_promotable(result, comparison) applies the card rule — actionable regression refuses, actionable gain is a real beat, within-noise is never a rejection (supersedes athome GateResult.promote's point-AUC fold); fails closed on NaN in both branches.
- cc_steer/retrain/sweep.py: ArmScore(metric, probs, frame_digest); score reports persist per-row probs + frame digest; compare_score_reports pairs any two reports on the frozen frame (FrameMismatch on digest drift) with unpaired card-floor fallback for pre-existing prob-less reports; CLI `cc-steer compare-arms`.
- Golden tests: E27 (existing) + new E28 fixture (tests/fixtures/delong_e28.npz) reproduce delta -0.012765523916255184, se 0.008474891744836933, rho 0.6984478492100372, ci95, mde_paired (rel 1e-4: report used literal 2.8016), verdict "within noise floor (MDE 0.0237)"; card-rule branch tests (actionable/noise/unpaired fallback). No home paths at test runtime.

Gates: full pytest 997 passed / 3 skipped (encoder extra, pre-existing); Linux ty (docker) all checks passed; docs reference updated (Instrument section + sweep compare) via cc-guides render + gd-build.
